name: care-pilot-monorepo
description: Care Pilot monorepo (FastAPI backend + Next.js web)

scripts.web:dev: uv run python scripts/cli.py web env -- pnpm --dir apps/web dev
scripts.web:build: uv run python scripts/cli.py web env -- pnpm --dir apps/web build
scripts.web:lint: uv run python scripts/cli.py web env -- pnpm --dir apps/web lint
scripts.web:typecheck: uv run python scripts/cli.py web env -- pnpm --dir apps/web typecheck
scripts.web:e2e: uv run python scripts/cli.py web env -- pnpm --dir apps/web test:e2e
scripts.test:backend: uv run python scripts/cli.py test backend
scripts.test:web: uv run python scripts/cli.py test web
scripts.test:comprehensive: uv run python scripts/cli.py test comprehensive
scripts.validate:backend: uv run python scripts/cli.py test backend
scripts.validate:full: uv run python scripts/cli.py test comprehensive
